info.name: 🏢 SaaS CRM — Complete API Collection 2
info.description:
Complete API collection for all 6 microservices:
1. Auth Service (port 5001)
2. User Service (port 5002)
3. Notification Service (port 5003)
4. Subscription Service (port 5004)
5. Lead Service (port 5005)
6. Calling Service (port 5006)

**Setup:**
Set these collection variables before testing:
- `AUTH_URL` = http://localhost:5001/api/auth
- `USER_URL` = http://localhost:5002/api/users
- `NOTIFY_URL` = http://localhost:5003/api/notifications
- `SUB_URL` = http://localhost:5004/api/subscriptions
- `LEAD_URL` = http://localhost:5005/api/leads
- `CALL_URL` = http://localhost:5006/api/calls
- `INTERNAL_SECRET` = my_internal_service_secret_789

Run **Register** first → tokens auto-save via Tests script.

{
  "name": "Skyline Realty Pvt Ltd",
  "description": "Premium real estate in Mumbai",
  "industry": "Real Estate",
  "size": "11-50",
  "billingEmail": "billing@skyline.com",
  "website": "https://skyline.com"
}

{
  "userId": "auth-user-id",
  "title": "Test Notification",
  "body": "This is a test in-app notification.",
  "type": "IN_APP",
  "priority": "NORMAL"
}

{
  "name": "Initial Contact — Real Estate v1",
  "type": "INITIAL_CONTACT",
  "language": "hi-en",
  "openingLine": "Namaste {{lead_name}}, main Skyline Realty se bol raha hoon. Aapne hamare property mein interest dikhaya tha.",
  "body": "Kya aap abhi 2-3 minute baat kar sakte hain? Main aapko ek achha deal batana chahta hoon jo aapke budget mein fit hoga.",
  "closingLine": "Bahut accha. Main aapko details WhatsApp karta hoon aur kal call karta hoon appointment ke liye."
}

{
  "sentiment": "POSITIVE",

  "extractedBudgetMin": 5000000,
